untranslatable_reason: This is a manual pair-trading strategy with pre-market MATLAB-calculated spread thresholds and manual button-based exit execution. The entry condition depends on a proprietary spread price calculation not available in the allowed indicators list. The spread itself is a derived synthetic instrument (long one leg, short another) that cannot be expressed as a single indicator. The exit is purely discretionary (manual button press) with no quantifiable condition provided. Critical parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life, backtest_sharpe, backtest_period) are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred.
translation_notes: Signal CHAN_QT_DRY_0 represents a systematic pair-trading framework that requires: (1) pre-calculated spread thresholds from external MATLAB algorithm, (2) spread trader interface (REDIPlus) to place limit orders on synthetic spread, (3) manual discretionary exit via button press. This cannot be reduced to standard technical indicators. To backtest this strategy, you would need: the actual pair composition (symbol1, symbol2), the hedge ratio, the MATLAB algorithm parameters, and historical spread prices. Recommend treating as a manual/discretionary strategy or obtaining the pre-calculated threshold values and pair definitions from the original author.
